Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Arms (Amendment) Rules, 2020. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Arms Rules, 2016, in rule 15, in sub-rules (2) and (4), for the figures, letters and words “ 1st day of April, 2019”, the figures, letters and word, “ 30th June, 2020” shall be substituted. [F. No. V-11026/133/2017-Arms] PUNYA SALILA SRIVASTAVA, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide notification number GSR 701(E), dated the 15th July, 2016 and subsequently amended vide GSR 1342 (E), dated the 27th October, 2017, GSR 1468(E), dated the 28th November, 2017,GSR 624 (E), dated the 11th July, 2018, GSR 644(E), dated the 12th July, 2018 and GSR 1079 (E), dated the 1st November, 2018. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
